nasb.text: And likewise I, my brothers and my servants are lending them money and grain. Please, let us leave off this usury.

esv.text: Moreover, I and my brothers and my servants are lending them money and grain. Let us abandon this exacting of interest.

cnv.text: 現在我和我的兄弟，以及我的僕人要把銀錢和五穀借給他們。讓我們大家都放棄放債取利吧！

ccb.text: 我和我的兄弟及仆人都借钱、借粮给民众，现在我们要停止放高利贷。
